qa_pairs.question: Who is responsible for submitting support requests to Compute Canada for COVID-19 related research?
qa_pairs.answer: The Principal Investigator (PI) should be the one making the support request to Compute Canada for COVID-19 related research.

qa_pairs.question: What essential information should always be included when contacting Compute Canada for support regarding COVID-19 research?
qa_pairs.answer: When contacting Compute Canada for COVID-19 research support, researchers must always include a short description of the research, a justification of how it will help solve the current crisis, and a description of the kind of support needed.

qa_pairs.question: What other resources are available to Canadian researchers working on COVID-19, besides support from Compute Canada?
qa_pairs.answer: In addition to Compute Canada's support, Canadian researchers can access resources through the COVID-19 HPC Consortium, Google Cloud credits (Google announced $20 million worth for research on COVID-19), and resources offered by Digital Ocean.
